# MuscleLove Network

> Official hub for MuscleLove: female muscle, fitness, AI tools, BOOTH, Patreon, and adult-oriented FANZA navigation. This file lists only pages that exist in the current public repository.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://musclelove-777.github.io/): MuscleLove Network entry point.
- [Patreon](https://musclelove-777.github.io/patreon/): official support page.
- [BOOTH SEO Hub](https://musclelove-777.github.io/booth-seo-hub/): product and BOOTH sales hub.
- [FANZA Guide](https://musclelove-777.github.io/eronavi/): adult-oriented guide hub for users 18+.
- [AI Tools Network](https://musclelove-777.github.io/network/ai/): AI tool discovery hub.
- [Fitness Network](https://musclelove-777.github.io/network/fitness/): fitness and female muscle hub.
- [Academy Network](https://musclelove-777.github.io/network/academy/): learning and business knowledge hub.

## Sales And Support

- [BOOTH products](https://musclelove-777.github.io/booth-seo-hub/products/): product index.
- [Train Tanktop Waki](https://musclelove-777.github.io/booth-seo-hub/products/train-tanktop-waki.html): BOOTH product landing page.
- [Train Gal Waki](https://musclelove-777.github.io/booth-seo-hub/products/train-gal-waki.html): BOOTH product landing page.

## Official Links

- [X @MuscleGirlLove7](https://x.com/MuscleGirlLove7)

## Notes

This `llms.txt` is maintained for LLM-based crawlers and AI search agents. It intentionally excludes removed or missing legacy URLs.
